_comment: Install via: claude mcp add opencode-search --transport http-sse http://127.0.0.1:8765/mcp -s user (requires daemon running). Or use stdio: claude mcp add opencode-search /path/to/.venv/bin/python -- -m opencode_search daemon bridge-stdio -s user. After adding, also add the UserPromptSubmit hook to ~/.claude/settings.json (see INSTALL.md).

env._comment: Optional but recommended: pin the workspace root so the bridge cannot access indexes outside the opened project.

opencode-search.description: GPU-accelerated local semantic code search. Index your projects and search with natural language.
